mapper.select: select * from process WHERE isShow = 1 ORDER BY sortID;
mapper.insert: insert into process(name, title, content,img, sortID, isShow, addTime, updateTime) values(#{name}, #{title}, #{content}, #{img}, #{sortID}, #{isShow}, #{addTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update process set name = #{name}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, img = #{img}, isShow = #{isShow}, sortID = #{sortID}, updateTime = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
update process set isShow = 0 where id = #{id}
